submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import XGate
bloq = XGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran XGate, chosen because the intent is the standard one-qubit bit flip.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 2x2 unitary and swaps |0> with |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import ZGate
bloq = ZGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran ZGate, the standard one-qubit phase flip with -1 on |1>.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 2x2 unitary and applies a -1 phase only to |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Hadamard
bloq = Hadamard()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran Hadamard bloq for the textbook H action on one qubit.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 2x2 unitary with Hadamard columns (|0>+|1>)/sqrt2 and (|0>-|1>)/sqrt2.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CNOT
bloq = CNOT()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran CNOT; under Qualtran raw big-endian contraction the first register is the control and second is target.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary; in big-endian order it fixes |00>, |01> and swaps |10>, |11>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TwoBitSwap
bloq = TwoBitSwap()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran TwoBitSwap, a two-qubit swap bloq for |ab> -> |ba>.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary and swaps |01> with |10>, fixing |00> and |11>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import Toffoli
bloq = Toffoli()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran Toffoli, matching controls on the first two registers and target on the third.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 8x8 unitary and swaps |110> with |111>, fixing all other basis states.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=2)
submissions.construction_method: Qualtran QFTTextBook(bitsize=2), using the brief's textbook raw QFT with no output bit-reversal swaps.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary for QFTTextBook(bitsize=2), raw textbook QFT without bit reversal.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=3)
submissions.construction_method: Qualtran QFTTextBook(bitsize=3), using the brief's textbook raw QFT with no output bit-reversal swaps.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 8x8 unitary for QFTTextBook(bitsize=3), raw textbook QFT without bit reversal.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import SGate
bloq = SGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran SGate, the standard phase gate diag(1,i).
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 2x2 unitary and applies phase i only to |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import TGate
bloq = TGate()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran TGate, the standard phase gate diag(1, exp(i*pi/4)).
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 2x2 unitary and applies phase exp(i*pi/4) only to |1>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.basic_gates import CZ
bloq = CZ()
submissions.construction_method: Native Qualtran CZ, diagonal controlled-Z with -1 on the |11> basis state.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary and diagonal with -1 phase only on |11>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
import cirq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP)
submissions.construction_method: Cirq interop via CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ISWAP), because iSWAP is directly available as a Cirq gate and has no native bloq listed in the brief.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary; |01> maps to i|10> and |10> maps to i|01>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
import cirq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ControlledGate(cirq.S))
submissions.construction_method: Cirq interop via CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.ControlledGate(cirq.S)), implementing controlled-S with the first qubit as control.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 4x4 unitary and diagonal with i phase only on |11> under first-qubit control.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.cirq_interop import CirqGateAsBloq
import cirq
bloq = CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.CCZ)
submissions.construction_method: Cirq interop via CirqGateAsBloq(cirq.CCZ), implementing the standard doubly-controlled Z phase on |111>.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 8x8 unitary and diagonal with -1 phase only on |111>.

submissions.bloq_code:
from qualtran.bloqs.qft.qft_text_book import QFTTextBook
bloq = QFTTextBook(bitsize=4)
submissions.construction_method: Qualtran QFTTextBook(bitsize=4), using the brief's textbook raw QFT with no output bit-reversal swaps.
submissions.self_check: Checked tensor_contract() is 16x16 unitary for QFTTextBook(bitsize=4), raw textbook QFT without bit reversal.
